name: Grand Prix Race
description: Baseline race-session preset for Phase 1 scenario selection and run logging.

provenance.notes: Represents a typical race-session shape for schema selection, not an exhaustive sporting-regulation model.

assumptionNotes.note: Session timing, incidents, and operational states remain placeholders until strategy and race-operations phases land.

provenance.notes: Only the stable selection contract matters in Phase 1.
